calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2016 Off Calendar

Notice And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Aug-31-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. HALLIE VON ROCK OF THE AIMAN-SMITH MARCY LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 1-510-562-6800 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ANGEL R. SEVILLA OF JACKSON LEWIS PC, TEL. NO. 1-415-394-3700 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED REGARDING ATTORNEY'S FEE IN CONNECTION WITH THE WORK DONE BY THE LAW FIRM. PLAINTIFF CALLIE GREEN's Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement is Granted. The court granted attorney's fee in the amount of $607,323 and the difference between the amount requested will be paid to the class members. Moving party to prepare form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR # 6576 =302/hk

Final Approval Hearing (Control Date)
Off Calendar Aug-30-2016 Text Ruling

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2016 Continued To Oct-12-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Jun-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Hallie Von Rock of Aiman-Smith & Marcy telephone number 510-562-6800 for Plaintiff Callie Green.
Angel Sevilla pf Jackson Lewis P.C. telephone number 415-394-9400 for Defendant Presidio International Inc.

PLAINTIFF CALLIE GREEN'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is granted. Order signed in open Court. The final approval hearing is set for August 31, 2016.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2016 Continued To Jul-20-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar May-12-2016 Continued To Jun-02-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. HALLIE VON ROCK OF AIMAN-SMITH MARCY LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 1-510-562-6800 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ANGEL R. SEVILLA OF JACKSON LEWIS LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 1-415-796-5461 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED REGARDING ISSUES RAISED BY THE COURT REGARDING PAGA CLAIMS AND SERVICE TO THE LABOR & WORKPLACE AGENCY. THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CALLIE GREEN'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is continued to June 2, 2016 for the Petitioner to serve the Labor & Workplace Agency and other issue raised by the court regarding Proration. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter; Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976
